message:
feat: Add HTTP server mode (zell serve) with OpenAI-compatible API

Add daemon mode that keeps model loaded for instant responses:
- New `zell serve <model>` command starts HTTP server on port 11434
- OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint
- New `zell ask <prompt>` client command for quick queries
- Supports --port and --host options

Also includes Q-Healing fixes from previous session:
- Fix batch.n_tokens ordering bug in scheduler (was checked before set)
- Add F_NOCACHE for GGUF reader to prevent macOS RAM pressure
- Fix resize spam by requiring usage < 10% before shrinking
- Layer-by-layer GGUF reading for reference model

Startup: ~40s first request, <100ms subsequent (vs ~40s every request)
